text:
Hello animint2  Contributors & Maintainer,
espically <@U03DB9C070R> sir,
I'm epixJayant, and I've been exploring the animint2 and ggplots, learning and completing the exercises given in the manual, since i loved video editing , graphics designing and currently i'm pursuing B.Tech in Mathematics and Computing , loving statistics, i decided to contribute on animint2 (Animated Interactive Data Visualization) project.
I'm really dedicated to animint2 , and I'm open to Any guidance and suggestion as a new contributor to animint2,
Thanks, and I'm excited to get familiar with the workflow of animint2 repo.
